generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving identifier and type errors reported by the AGREE validator.
Prioritize fixing unresolved references or invalid helper declarations over architectural changes.
Ensure AGREE expressions use types consistent with the underlying AADL data representation.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
Range comparisons on Boolean or opaque data types are often invalid and should be removed.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce unqualified identifiers or data types not present in the AADL model.
Avoid converting Boolean values to integers in AGREE expressions.
Do not attempt to repair by adding architecture; focus on fixing the contract itself.
